full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #64 (2026-06-16)

PULSE
Health: 0.5209 (C). 1054 wallets, 313 contributors. 56 memos today vs 237 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
201 reward payments, 745661 PFT distributed to 36 contributors. Top earner: rKTbxK...got3 (175007 PFT).

AIRDROPS
Daily airdrops not yet issued today (drops at ~21:08 UTC). 7-day leader: r4ahFv...5XyU (3,500 PFT, avg 3,500/day over 1 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rKTbxK...got3 (351 memos). Fastest new contributor: raUWC4...TbsW (11.0 memos/day in 1 days). 20 new wallet(s) this week. 76 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 69.5%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-05-17): 159 transactions from 30 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
